title: populus cathayana var. latifolia
intro: Populus cathayana var. latifolia, also known as Chinese white poplar or Chinese silver poplar, is a variant of the Populus cathayana tree species native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Populus cathayana var. latifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
